attempt: Transfer TICKET46's rule: a finite symbolic grammar that only works by adding a horizon/depth escape coordinate cannot be promoted to a proof. It must either become a compact invariant theorem or produce a genuine counterexample.

bounded_result.discarded_shortcut: finite residue margin grammar repaired by cutoff-dependent constants
bounded_result.retained_target: A compact exceptional-residue margin theorem with explicit constants fixed before the cutoff is extended.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: a large even integer or residue class whose pressure edge violates every fixed margin grammar

obstruction: The project has improved the falsification protocol for proposed proof grammars, but this transfer is not an infinite proof and not a certified counterexample.
candidate_theorem: A compact exceptional-residue margin theorem with explicit constants fixed before the cutoff is extended.
next_experiment: Audit cutoff-dependent constants and convert them into explicit inequalities or counterexamples.
claim_boundary: No goldbach proof and no certified goldbach counterexample.
